steps.title: Identify the shared literary technique
steps.content: Cisneros and Castillo both incorporate Spanish vocabulary into their English-language works without providing translations, yet readers understand the Spanish passages through context clues.

steps.title: Match to the correct answer
steps.content: D names the central practice shown in the passage—the use of non-English vocabulary in English-language literary works. The other choices misdirect to translation into other languages, commercial success, and regional popularity, none of which the passage addresses. That matches choice D — D is correct.
